name: planning-piv
description: Analyze Bitcoin-API code paths and produce a concise execution plan before edits.

# Planning (PIV)

Use this skill before implementation.

## Steps
1. Identify the exact files and components impacted by the task.
2. Describe assumptions, constraints, and edge cases.
3. Produce a short checklist plan with validation steps.
4. Keep the plan scoped to the smallest safe set of edits.
